rules.name: reservedQtyMustBePositive
rules.description: Reserved quantity must be greater than zero when creating or updating a reservation.
rules.action: throw OBException('Reserved quantity must be positive')

rules.name: releasedQtyCannotExceedReserved
rules.description: Total released quantity across all stock lines cannot exceed the header reserved quantity.
rules.action: throw OBException('Released quantity exceeds reserved quantity')

rules.name: stockLineQtyMustBePositive
rules.description: Each stock line quantity must be greater than zero.
rules.action: throw OBException('Stock line quantity must be positive')

rules.name: statusTransitionValidation
rules.description: Status transitions: DR->CO (complete), CO->CL (closed), CO->HO (on hold). No other transitions allowed.

rules.name: completedReservationReadOnly
rules.description: Once a reservation is closed (CL), no modifications are allowed on the header or its stock lines.
rules.action: throw OBException('Closed reservation cannot be modified')
